docerSourcesChecked.result: public page reachable; page loads icon marketplace resources from WPS CDN
anonymous API returned icon tag names, including 免费
anonymous API exposed a sample SVG storage_url, but the item carried privilege_name=docer_icon
sample collection returned free_count=0 and vip_count=12
WPS Docer service agreement states that digital works' intellectual property is not transferred to users and out-of-scope usage requires written authorization from the rights holder.

decision: No rights-unclear Docer SVG asset is copied into this repository. Generated SVG files are original project assets; actual Docer assets may be copied only when metadata or authorization explicitly allows repository redistribution.
